name: Apple Schnapps Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually add apple sauce and apple schnapps, beating well after each addition.
3. Add dry ingredients one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
4. Stir in the eggs, beating until smooth.
5. Fold in chopped nuts and raisins (if using).
6. Grease and flour a bundt pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool before removing from the pan.
